summary: Testing of security training platform features: Login without 2FA, Online Users endpoint, Executive Training modules API, and PowerPoint generation. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: test_login_without_2fa_field_succeeds - PASS (Login returns token without 2FA code)
Backend: test_available_modules_contains_data - PASS (Returns 4 modules: phishing, social_engineering, password_security, data_protection)
Backend: test_generate_presentation_endpoint - PASS (Returns valid PPTX file)
Frontend: Login page loads correctly without 2FA field - PASS
Frontend: Can login with valid credentials without 2FA and see dashboard - PASS
Frontend: Login form shows forgot password link - PASS
Frontend: Can toggle to inquiry form - PASS
Frontend: Complete flow: Login -> Dashboard -> Executive Training -> Download PPTX - PASS

features_verified.login_without_2fa: PASS - Login endpoint /api/auth/login accepts email+password only, returns token without requiring 2FA code during login
features_verified.online_users_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/analytics/online-users returns online_count, online_users list (users active in last 5 minutes), minutes_threshold
features_verified.executive_training_modules: PASS - GET /api/executive-training/available-modules returns 4 pre-built modules with slide counts
features_verified.powerpoint_generation: PASS - GET /api/executive-training/generate/{module_key} returns valid PPTX file for download
features_verified.dashboard_online_now_card: PASS - Dashboard displays 'Online Now' stat card with count of users active in last 5 minutes

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Login without 2FA field tested successfully. Online Users API returns users active in last 5 minutes. Executive Training page shows 4 pre-built modules (Email Phishing Awareness, Social Engineering Defense, Password Security, Data Protection & Privacy) with Download PPTX functionality. Rate limiting is active on login endpoint - wait 60s between failed login attempts.
api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - Returns token with email+password only (no 2FA required)
